acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] WAL replay records checkpoint dirty shards for all recovered events before startup completes
- [ ] Replay API shape prevents dropping apply outcomes without explicit handling
- [ ] Regression test: crash + replay + incremental checkpoint includes recovered mutations
description:
**Problem**
Startup `replay_event_wal` applies recovered events to memory but does not register checkpoint dirty shards, so incremental checkpoint export can omit recovered changes and re-emit stale shard files.

**Files:** `crates/beads-daemon/src/runtime/core/helpers.rs`, `crates/beads-daemon/src/runtime/core/repo_load.rs`, `crates/beads-daemon/src/runtime/store/runtime.rs`, `crates/beads-git/src/checkpoint/export.rs`
design: Make replay return a typed replay artifact that includes dirty-shard effects and require consuming it before replay completion. The API should make "apply without checkpoint tracking" impossible.
title: Replay WAL recovery must register checkpoint dirty shards
